title: Nobleza Cat Bed Mat, Fluffy Bubble Fleece Cat Beds for Indoor Cats Kittens, Warm Kitten Cushion, Soft Plush Pet Cushion, Washable Pet Bed Mat for Small Cats Kitten Kitty, 50x40cm, Brown
features: Supremely Soft Bubble Fleece Comfort – Crafted with luxurious, fluffy bubble fleece, this Nobleza cat bed mat provides exceptional warmth and cosiness for your feline friend or small dog. The plush, skin-friendly surface mimics a gentle embrace, offering a soothing retreat for indoor cats and kittens, making it the perfect warm cat bed for peaceful naps and chilly nights.

Cotton Support – Generously filled with high-loft, soft cotton, this pet cushion delivers optimal support for bones and joints. It effectively alleviates pressure, reduces joint pain, and eases symptoms of arthritis, providing crucial comfort for cats, or small dogs with aching muscles, ensuring they wake up feeling refreshed.

Versatile for Any Spot and Perfectly Sized – From the living room sofa to the car boot, crate, or even a sunny spot in the garden, this kitten mat is the ideal small pet bed for any occasion. Available in two practical sizes (50x40cm and 70x50cm).

Secure Non-Slip Base and Effortless Cleaning – The sturdy, non-slip bottom keeps the cat cushion firmly in place on all floor types for your pet's safety. This entire washable cat bed is machine washable for ultimate convenience. Six stitching points prevent filling clumping, keeping it fluffy wash after wash. Care Guide: Machine wash cold on gentle cycle. Tumble dry low. Do not bleach. Do not iron.

First Opening Tips – Shipped in space-saving vacuum packaging for your convenience. Simply unbox, shake well, and gently pat the mat to loosen the filling. For the ultimate comfort, we recommend letting it rest for about 24-48 hours to fully expand to its maximum plushness before your pet enjoys their new favourite nap spot.
